title: The Fragility Atlas: Multiverse Robustness Analysis of 407 Cochrane Meta-Analyses
description: Code, data, and interactive dashboard for a large-scale multiverse analysis assessing the robustness of 407 Cochrane meta-analyses across 7 estimators, 3 CI methods, 3 bias corrections, and leave-one-out sensitivity. 56.2% of meta-analyses were classified as fragile or unstable.

creators.name: Ahmad, Mahmood
creators.affiliation: Royal Free Hospital, London, United Kingdom
